scope.selection_note: Codex-only do-not-merge review artifact after identity193. Scope is current route/corridor duplicate_global_identity pairs only. No provider-backed commands were run. Inputs were inspected read-only: current validateRepo duplicate_global_identity output, data/canonical/routes.jsonl, data/canonical/corridors.jsonl, data/identity-overrides/merges.json, data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json, and referenced raw source blocks.
scope.write_limit: Exactly one artifact was written: data/review_notes/codex-identity-dnm-batch198-prep.json. No merges.json, do-not-merge.json, LOG.md, manifest, submissions, canonical outputs, DB, materialized outputs, or wiki files were edited.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_b103-ltd-proposed-draft and route_b103e-express-cb18-jun2017 share identity key route_b103.
source_canonical_evidence: route_b103-ltd-proposed-draft: display_name 'Proposed B103 LTD', route_id 'B103 LTD', route_type_normalized 'limited_stop', service_variant 'limited_stop', borough 'Brooklyn'.
route_b103e-express-cb18-jun2017: display_name 'B103 Express', route_id 'B103E', route_label 'B103E', route_type_normalized 'express', service_variant 'express', borough 'Brooklyn'.
Source block brt_south_brooklyn_b82_cb18_jun2017#p037_c0004 lists separate stop sign labels including B82, B82E, B103E, BM2, and Flatlands Av & E 105 St.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: Shared base label B103 is not enough to merge a proposed limited-stop B103 LTD route with a distinct B103E express route label and express service variant.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_b82-limited-brt-south-brooklyn-2017 and route_b82-local share identity key route_b82.
source_canonical_evidence: route_b82-limited-brt-south-brooklyn-2017: display_name 'B82 Limited', route_type_normalized 'limited_stop', service_variant 'limited_stop', description says existing B82 Limited service would be converted to B82 SBS.
route_b82-local: display_name 'B82 in Southern Brooklyn', route_type_normalized 'local', service_variant 'local'.

Canonical merged field values on route_b82-local include 'All current stops will still be served by the B82 Local after SBS conversion'; route_b82-limited-brt-south-brooklyn-2017 evidence includes B82 Limited/SBS conversion context.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: The pair represents different B82 service variants: existing limited-stop service versus local service. The source context explicitly preserves local stop coverage separately from limited/SBS conversion.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_bx40-bx42-tremont-cb5-2024 and route_bx42-tremont-cab1 share identity key route_bx42.
source_canonical_evidence: route_bx40-bx42-tremont-cb5-2024: display_name 'Bx40/42', route_id 'Bx40/42', aliases include route_bx40 and route_bx42, and merged route_id values include Bx40, Bx42, and Bx40/Bx42.
route_bx42-tremont-cab1: display_name 'Bx42', route_id 'Bx42', source_id tremont_ave_bus_priority_cab1_dec2022.
Source block tremont_ave_bus_priority_cab1_dec2022#p007_c0002 says Bx40/Bx42 serves Tremont Av east of Rosedale Av.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: A bundled Bx40/Bx42 corridor-service record should not be collapsed into the single-route Bx42 record just because the bundle contains Bx42.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_m34-local-2011 and route_m34-sbs share identity key route_m34.
source_canonical_evidence: route_m34-local-2011: display_name 'M34 Bus Route (Local)', route_type_normalized 'local', service_variant 'local', description 'M34 local bus route operating on 34th Street'.
route_m34-sbs: display_name 'M34/M34A on 34th Street Busway', route_type_normalized 'select_bus_service', service_variant 'sbs', route_label 'M34 SBS'.
Source block 34th_st_busway#p002_c0005 references M34/M34A SBS; route_m34-local-2011 evidence and payload preserve pre/SBS local-bus context.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: The records are different M34 service variants: local bus versus Select Bus Service. The shared base route key is lifecycle/corridor context, not durable same-route identity.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_bronx-flushing-jamaica-sbs and route_q44-cb12-2011 share identity key route_q44.
source_canonical_evidence: route_bronx-flushing-jamaica-sbs: display_name 'Q44-SBS - ABLE route', route_id 'Q44+', route_type_normalized 'select_bus_service', service_variant 'sbs', description 'SBS on Q44 bus route connecting Bronx, Flushing, and Jamaica'.

route_q44-cb12-2011: display_name 'Q44 local bus route', route_id 'Q44', route_type_normalized 'local', service_variant 'local', with merged values also preserving Q44 Limited/Q44 LTD predecessor context.

Source block brt_route_index#p001_b0001 says the Bronx-Flushing-Jamaica Select Bus Service began service on November 29, 2015 on the Q44 route; source block 2014_10_07_brt_flushingjamaica_pw1_presentation#p014_c0003 separately lists Q44: Jamaica to Bronx Zoo.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: The records distinguish Q44 SBS from the pre/SBS local-limited Q44 record. Replacement or upgrade context should remain a relation, not a route identity merge.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global corridor records corridor_broadway-manhattan-upper and corridor_bus-fwd-2-broadway-bronx-local share identity key corridor_broadway.
source_canonical_evidence: corridor_broadway-manhattan-upper: display_name 'Broadway, 157th Street to 220th Street, Manhattan', borough_normalized 'manhattan', limits '157th Street to 220th Street'.
corridor_bus-fwd-2-broadway-bronx-local: display_name 'Broadway, Bronx (W 225th St to W 231st St)', borough_normalized 'bronx', from 'W 225th St', to 'W 231st St'.

Source block broadway_157_st_220_st_cb12_mar2025#p005_c0002 says Broadway from 157th St to 220th St; source block bus_forward_2#p011_c0002 lists the Bronx Broadway segment from W 225th St to W 231st St.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: Shared street name Broadway is a weak key. The records are in different boroughs with different physical limits, so this should be a durable do-not-merge suppression.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global corridor records corridor_meeting-doc-109341-montauk-branch-amityville-babylon and corridor_meeting-doc-109341-montauk-branch-babylon-sayville share identity key corridor_montauk-branch.
source_canonical_evidence: corridor_meeting-doc-109341-montauk-branch-amityville-babylon: corridor_name 'Montauk Branch', limits 'between Amityville and Babylon', description says Third Rail State of Good Repair work.
corridor_meeting-doc-109341-montauk-branch-babylon-sayville: corridor_name 'Montauk Branch', limits 'between Babylon and Sayville', description says Signal Hut Installation work.
Source block meeting_doc_109341#p001_c0005 names both projects separately: Third Rail work between Amityville and Babylon, and Signal Hut Installation between Babylon and Sayville.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: Both records are on the Montauk Branch, but they are separate bounded branch segments with different endpoints and work scopes.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global corridor records corridor_third-ave-36th-to-55th and corridor_third-ave-55th-to-57th share identity key corridor_third-ave.
source_canonical_evidence: corridor_third-ave-36th-to-55th: display_name 'Third Avenue: 36th Street to 55th Street', description 'Section 1 of Third Avenue Bus Lane Improvements project', limits '36th Street to 55th Street'.
corridor_third-ave-55th-to-57th: display_name 'Third Avenue: 55th Street to 57th Street', description 'Section 2 of Third Avenue Bus Lane Improvements project', limits '55th Street to 57th Street'.
Source blocks 2014_05_05_brt_thirdave_cb6_presentation#p004_c0001 and #p008_c0001 label these as Section 1 36th Street to 55th Street and Section 2 55th Street to 57th Street.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: The records are adjacent but distinct Third Avenue sections. Shared street name should not collapse section-specific corridor records with different limits and section labels.

deferred.reason: Deferred because route_b44-brt-phase2 -> route_b44-sbs was already prepared as an alias in identity182; adding a conflicting do-not-merge suggestion would be unsafe without a conductor decision.

deferred.reason: Deferred because route_m14-brt-phase2 -> route_m14-ad-sbs was already prepared in identity179, so this needs prior-prep reconciliation rather than a new suppression proposal.

deferred.reason: Likely participant-idea/context record versus Q53 SBS/ACE route, but deferred because a stronger source review is needed before making a durable suppression.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global corridor records corridor_14th-st-crosstown-brt-phase2 and corridor_14th-street-ttp share identity keys corridor_14th-st-crosstown-brt-phase2 and corridor_14th-st-crosstown-corridor.
deferred.reason: Likely broad Phase II candidate versus specific Transit and Truck Priority operating corridor, but deferred because a project lifecycle review may decide whether these should be related by phase rather than suppressed.

deferred.reason: Likely subsegment versus broader Woodhaven Boulevard corridor, but deferred because the broader record may be intentionally page-bearing for the whole corridor and needs a full Woodhaven cluster policy.

commands: bun --eval import { validateRepo } from './packages/agents/src/index.ts'; report current duplicate_global_identity issues for routes/corridors
bun --eval read-only inspection of current route/corridor canonical JSONL records, merges.json, and do-not-merge.json
bun --eval exact guard check for current record presence, merge roots, existing direct/resolved do-not-merge pairs, and same-root merge collapse
rg/read-only inspection of referenced raw source blocks for decisive service variant, bundle, borough, branch-segment, and corridor-limit evidence

conductor_apply_note: This is a review artifact only. If accepted, add durable do-not-merge pairs rather than aliases for the eight proposed pairs.
